def positive_importlib_import_module_called_inside_request_handler():
    rule_id = "importlib_import_module_called_inside_request_handler"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "importlib.import_module called inside a request handler instead of at application startup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
